name: Chichibu Railway Co., Ltd.
summary: Chichibu Railway Co., Ltd. engages in the railway business in Japan. It operates trains, passenger cars, electric and steam locomotives, freight cars, and private wagons. The company is also involved in the rental of real estate properties, such as apartments, detached houses, stores and offices, monthly parking lots, second-hand housing, etc. In addition, it engages in tourism businesses. Chichibu Railway Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1899 and is headquartered in Kumagaya, Japan.
